semantic.role: Infrastructure utility for loading and parsing Spine rule documents from the filesystem.
responsibilities: Reads rule files from disk using synchronous file system operations.
Parses rule file content using gray-matter frontmatter parsing.
Normalizes rule severity values to a standard lowercase format.
Generates URL-friendly slugs from rule identifiers for consistent referencing.
outOfScope: Writing or modifying rule files on disk.
invariants: Must only expose stable low-level file reading and parsing capabilities.
Must not absorb service/task/engine orchestration concerns.
Callers should prefer this public facade over reaching into deep private implementation paths.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, low-level infrastructure facade for loading and parsing Spine rule documents from the filesystem, ensuring consistent rule document structure and severity normalization.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected beyond general pipeline fixes; the file remains a stable infrastructure utility.

English.role: Infrastructure utility for loading and parsing Spine rule documents from the filesystem.
responsibilities: Reads rule files from disk using synchronous file system operations.
Parses rule file content using gray-matter frontmatter parsing.
Normalizes rule severity values to a standard lowercase format.
Generates URL-friendly slugs from rule identifiers for consistent referencing.
outOfScope: Writing or modifying rule files on disk.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于从文件系统加载和解析 Spine 规则文档的基础设施工具。
responsibilities: 使用同步文件系统操作从磁盘读取规则文件。
使用 gray-matter 前置元数据解析器解析规则文件内容。
将规则严重性值规范化为标准小写格式。
从规则标识符生成 URL 友好的短横线命名，以便一致引用。
outOfScope: 在磁盘上写入或修改规则文件。
